metadata.description: Short environment suffix. Must remain prod-only.
ACA app definitions for backend services only.
DB password shared by backend services.
JWT secret shared by backend services.
Azure region for the resource group.
Name of the PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
The SKU of the PostgreSQL server.
Principal ID of the managed identity that should pull images.

environmentVariables.value: [union(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].environmentVariables, createArray(createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'postgresql'), '2025-04-01').outputs.fullyQualifiedDomainName.value), createObject('name', 'DB_USER', 'value', parameters('dbUser')), createObject('name', 'CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN', 'value', 'https://agri-wizard.vercel.app')))]

metadata.description: Container Apps managed environment resource ID.
Service name used for container naming.
CPU cores as string value (for example 0.5, 1.0).
ACA secrets array: [{ name: string, value: string }].
Secure object containing secret values keyed by secret name.
Environment variables array: [{ name: string, value?: string, secretRef?: string }].
Set to true for public ingress.

containers.name: [parameters('serviceName')]
containers.image: [if(equals(parameters('imageName'), 'kong'), format('kong:{0}', parameters('imageTag')), format('{0}/{1}:{2}', parameters('acrLoginServer'), parameters('imageName'), parameters('imageTag')))]

environmentVariables.value: [union(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].environmentVariables, createArray(createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'postgresql'), '2025-04-01').outputs.fullyQualifiedDomainName.value), createObject('name', 'DB_USER', 'value', parameters('dbUser')), createObject('name', 'CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN', 'value', 'https://agri-wizard.vercel.app')))]

metadata.description: Container Apps managed environment resource ID.
Service name used for container naming.
CPU cores as string value (for example 0.5, 1.0).
ACA secrets array: [{ name: string, value: string }].
Secure object containing secret values keyed by secret name.
Environment variables array: [{ name: string, value?: string, secretRef?: string }].
Set to true for public ingress.

containers.name: [parameters('serviceName')]
containers.image: [if(equals(parameters('imageName'), 'kong'), format('kong:{0}', parameters('imageTag')), format('{0}/{1}:{2}', parameters('acrLoginServer'), parameters('imageName'), parameters('imageTag')))]

input.fqdn: [if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'kong'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('deploy-gateway-{0}', parameters('backendServices')[0].serviceName)), '2025-04-01').outputs.fqdn.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('deploy-core-{0}', parameters('backendServices')[if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'iam'), 0, if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'hardware'), 1, if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'analytics'), 2, if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'weather'), 3, if(equals(parameters('backendServices')[copyIndex()].serviceName, 'notification'), 4, 0)))))].serviceName)), '2025-04-01').outputs.fqdn.value)]
